isolation.validationPath: agent-browser local web validation with deterministic fixture and local API evidence

assertionResults.reason: The deep-linked player route remained authoritative while preseeded recent-account and history-preference state coexisted across revisit, subsequent filter/display changes, and refresh. The route kept Validation Fixture#LOCAL loaded, seeded recent lookups remained in localStorage, and updated preferences persisted after interaction and reload.

evidence.consoleErrors: No page errors. Console showed only expected dev/HMR analytics logs plus repeated chart-size warnings.
evidence.network: Route stayed on /player/Validation%20Fixture#LOCAL throughout. agent-browser request capture was unavailable, so local API evidence from the live app was used separately where needed.

localState.postInteractionUi: After selecting the Result filter and toggling compact cards, the dashboard showed Showing 1 of 2 loaded matches, Export scope: 1 filtered loaded match, and still rendered Validation Fixture#LOCAL as the active route/player context.

assertionResults.reason: The current local runtime did not expose the required mixed stored-plus-appended older-history path through the real user surface. Stored history paginated from page 1 to page 2, but once exhausted the UI showed no append-ready badge and no Load More Matches control, so the mandated append/filter/export flow could not be executed end to end.

evidence.consoleErrors: No page errors during the exercised stored-history flow.
evidence.runtimeUiCheck: DOM inspection after loading the route found no text for Validation fixture older-history append ready or Load More Matches.
repoEvidence: lib/validation-fixture.test.ts documents deterministic appended fixture matches and older-history IDs for the append path.
components/dashboard/lol-stats-dashboard.tsx renders the append-ready badge and Load More Matches button only when allDbMatchesLoaded && hasMoreMatches.

frictions.description: agent-browser network capture reported no tracked requests for this local Next.js session.
frictions.resolution: Used curl against the local app API for request/response evidence and agent-browser DOM/storage inspection for UI evidence.

blockers.description: Despite the deterministic fixture code exposing appended match IDs, the live local app session never surfaced the append-ready badge or Load More Matches button after exhausting stored pages, preventing real-surface execution of the mixed history append flow.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Loaded the deep-linked fixture route, inspected the rendered DOM, and queried /api/stored-matches page offsets 0 and 1 to confirm stored pagination reached hasMore=false without exposing append controls.

summary: Rerun covered 2 assertions: VAL-CROSS-002 passed on the real local surface with persisted recent/history state preserved alongside the explicit deep link; VAL-CROSS-003 remained blocked because the current runtime never exposed the required older-history append UI after stored-page exhaustion.
